title: Terviva Receives Investment from Chevron Renewable Energy Group to Scale Renewable Pongamia for Biofuel Production
content: Terviva, Inc., an agricultural innovation company working with farmers to grow and harvest pongamia for food, feed and fuel, today announced its investment fromÂ Chevron Renewable Energy Group. Together, the two companies expect to scale Tervivaâ€™s pongamia-growing operations and drive greater availability of pongamia as a feedstock for renewable fuels production. The new arrangement signals Tervivaâ€™s strategic growth and global scalability as well as the advancement of pongamia as a lower carbon resource for biofuels production.
author: Analysts Account
